title: Aavalum Naanum
desc: A young woman is forced to marry her sister's betrothed after her identical twin sister manages to elope with her boyfriend. However, things get complicated after the woman's beau finds out the truth.

title: Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru
desc: Kumar develops feelings for Sanjana, a new recruit in his company. He seeks guidance from Mokia, a love guru, to win her heart, unaware that she is Mokia's sister.

title: Mikhael
desc: A vengeful businessman pushes a young woman to attempt suicide over his son's death. Her doctor brother saves her and pledges to eradicate their enemies.

title: Meter
desc: Arjun Kalyan takes on the badge to honor his dad's wish, but when things get messy, he finds himself clashing with the powerful home minister.

title: Pokkiri Paiyan
desc: A trouble-making youth in a small town resorts to conning locals. When innocence meets ambition, he discovers empathy, friendship, and the power of redemption in unexpected ways.

title: Das Ka Dhamki
desc: Krishna Das, a struggling waiter, crushes on Keerthi, but loses her and his job. When his lookalike dies, he's recruited to step in for the doctor to save the company.

desc: Muthukumar, a taxi driver, falls in love with a telephone operator. Their relationship takes a profound turn when he learns about her traumatic past, altering his life forever.

desc: Weary of nomadic life, a young warrior of the Einar clan rebels against Ranadheera Pandiyan. Yet, his quest for power and wealth only leads to his own downfall and suffering.

title: Rangoon
desc: Julia journeys to the Indo-Burma border to perform for the troops during World War II, on the insistence of Billimoria, her lover. There, she finds herself enamoured by Jemadar Malik, a soldier.
